overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist Basim walking through a sunlit historic Baghdad courtyard and ascending to a rooftop observatory. The character navigates through crowds of NPCs, past market stalls and Islamic stone architecture, eventually climbing stairs to an upper level with astronomical instruments.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with market stalls and stone paving

events.description: character approaches the main building stairs and slows slightly while navigating around pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open courtyard toward the large stone building with arches, passing market stalls

notable_agents.action: seated on stone bench near the building entrance

entered.detail: large stone building with arched entrance and grand staircase flanked by columns
wooden market stall with green fabric canopy and hanging goods
wooden cart loaded with straw and goods parked near the stall
tall palm tree visible against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit open courtyard with stone paving, approaching a grand stone building with arches. Market stalls with green awnings and wooden carts line the path, while NPCs sit on benches nearby. Palm trees rise against the clear blue sky as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with hanging blue curtains

events.description: passes the main building entrance and turns into a narrower walkway with more pedestrians
enters shaded area with blue fabric curtains hanging between stone walls

agents.ego_description: navigating through crowds of pedestrians past the building entrance and through the curtained walkway, turning slightly to avoid collision

notable_agents.action: woman in dark robes walking across the character's path

entered.detail: teal blue fabric curtains hanging in a doorway between stone walls
decorative stone lattice work on wall with geometric patterns
stone tower structure with domed roof and arched openings

segments.scene_description: Moving past the grand building entrance, the character enters a narrower walkway populated with pedestrians. Blue fabric curtains hang between stone walls with decorative lattice work, creating a more enclosed feeling. The stone tower with a domed roof becomes visible in the distance as the character navigates through the opposing crowd flow.

events.description: character begins ascending wide stone stairs to upper tower level
reaches rooftop platform revealing large astronomical instrument and city overlook

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs to reach the upper tower level where a scholar stands near the astronomical device

notable_agents.action: scholar in green robes examining the astronomical instrument

entered.detail: large metal astronomical instrument resembling an astrolabe mounted on stone platform
distant panoramic view of the city with palm trees and buildings from elevated position
stone pavilion with pointed arches and domed roof providing shade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the stone tower and begins ascending the wide stairs to the upper level. Upon reaching the rooftop, a large metal astrolabe instrument comes into view on a stone platform, with a scholar in green robes examining it. The city overlook reveals distant buildings and palm trees under the bright sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with ivy walls and final rooftop ascent

events.description: character descends stairs from the observatory level back to ground courtyard
begins ascending final set of stairs to rooftop observatory structure

agents.ego_description: descending from the tower and walking through lower courtyards with ivy-covered walls before climbing final stairs to another rooftop

entered.detail: stone walls covered in dense green ivy and climbing vines
wooden bench with red cushion placed against wall
wooden gazebo structure with blue curtains housing scientific equipment

segments.scene_description: Descending from the observatory tower, the character moves through lower courtyards where stone walls are covered in dense ivy. After passing wooden benches and navigating through scattered pedestrians, the character begins ascending a final set of stairs toward a rooftop gazebo with blue curtains that houses another scientific instrument.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit public courtyard through narrow urban walkways and up into elevated scientific observatories. It begins by moving past market stalls with green awnings and palm trees toward a grand arched building, before shifting into a more enclosed walkway defined by decorative lattice work and hanging blue curtains. As the camera navigates through the crowd, the view opens up during an ascent up wide stone stairs to a rooftop platform featuring a large metal astrolabe and a panoramic overlook of the city. The scene then descends into lower courtyards where stone walls are draped in dense ivy, finally climbing a last set of stairs toward a rooftop gazebo housing another scientific instrument.
